hero_subtitle: SFTY links multi-provider blockchain risk data with structured compliance case management to streamline VASP operations and preserve audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Provider outputs remain disconnected from cases
problem_description: Compliance teams rely on separate blockchain analytics dashboards that do not integrate with case management workflows. This separation slows review processes and weakens auditability by scattering risk data and evidence across unlinked tools.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates blockchain analytics risk data, Travel Rule events and provider alerts into unified case workflows, enabling compliance teams to manage reviews, preserve evidence and accelerate decision-making within one operational system.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to case management
workflow_description: SFTY collects and normalizes provider results then routes alerts into structured cases with documented decisions and preserved evidence for compliance review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond analytics dashboards. One case management layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects blockchain analytics and provider outputs into structured case workflows with decisions, evidence and reporting, avoiding isolated dashboards and manual operational gaps.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs streamlining provider outputs into audit-ready cases with evidence preservation and governance for clearer bank due diligence and enterprise deployment control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a provider-neutral layer that connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, blockchain analytics and case workflows into one structured operating system.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect blockchain analytics outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and aggregates blockchain analytics data, routing alerts into case workflows where reviews, decisions and evidence are recorded for clear operational management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting provider outputs as audit-ready evidence accessible for internal review and regulatory inspection preparation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is designed to connect with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and analytics providers without requiring replacement or disrupting current compliance technology stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers; it integrates their outputs into structured reviews, case management, evidence collection and reporting workflows.
final_title: Connect blockchain analytics outputs to case workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY turns multi-provider blockchain risk data into structured compliance cases and preserves audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
